prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your long distance relationship forward
items: Schedule a dedicated conversation with your partner to establish communication expectations and preferred methods
Create a shared digital calendar with important dates, visits, and relationship milestones
Research and document the time zones, work schedules, and daily routines of both partners
Download and set up a relationship app or shared space for ongoing connection activities
Complete a relationship values assessment together to identify shared priorities and potential areas of compromise
Research and compile a list of virtual date activities you can do together online
